## Summary

## Related Issue

Closes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation only
- [ ] 🎨 UI / styling
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] 🧪 Tests
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / CI / tooling

## Screenshots / Recording

<!-- Required for any UI change. Drag & drop images or GIFs here. -->

## How Has This Been Tested?

<!-- Steps you followed to verify the change works. -->

- [ ] `bunx tsgo` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow in `bun run dev`

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's TypeScript + Tailwind conventions
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed (README, comments)
- [ ] I have not committed secrets or `.env` values
- [ ] New user-facing tables have `GRANT` + RLS policies in the same migration
- [ ] New server functions use `requireSupabaseAuth` where appropriate
- [ ] I have added Zod validation for any new server-function input
- [ ] I have added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` (if user-visible)
